name: continuevs-bridge-v2.0.0
description: Continue IDE Bridge - npm-based server for VS integration

scripts.initialize: node --input-type=module --eval "import('./lib/npm-init.mjs').then(m => m.initialize()).catch(e => { console.error('Initialization failed:', e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.validate: node --input-type=module --eval "import('./lib/npm-validate.mjs').then(m => m.validateIntegrity()).catch(e => { console.error('Validation failed:', e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.check-integrity: node --input-type=module --eval "import('./lib/npm-validate.mjs').then(m => m.checkPackageIntegrity()).catch(e => { console.error('Integrity check failed:', e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.health-check: node --input-type=module --eval "import('./lib/health-check.mjs').then(m => m.performHealthCheck()).catch(e => { console.error('Health check failed:', e); process.exit(1); })"

author: ContinueVS

_schema.name: Package configuration for Continue bridge v2.0.0
_schema.type: Defines ESM (ES Modules) support for Node.js import/export syntax
_schema.engines: Enforces Node.js 18+ for async/await, ESM, and modern JavaScript features
_schema.scripts.initialize: First-time setup: downloads npm packages, validates checksums, creates cache structure
_schema.scripts.validate: Post-download validation: verifies package integrity against checksums
_schema.scripts.check-integrity: Scheduled integrity check: ensures cached packages remain uncorrupted
_schema.scripts.health-check: Runtime diagnostics: validates bridge health and connection status
_schema.dependencies.continue: Pinned version of Continue package (reproducible builds, security tracking)
